description:
The Eltingville Club is a comic made by Evan Dorkin which follows the life and shenanigans of the four main characters; William "Bill" Alan Dickey, Secretary of Comic books and the leader of the club, Joshua "Josh" Aaron Levy, Secretary of Science Fiction, Peter "Pete" Michael DiNunzio, Secretary of Horror and Jerome "Jerry" Titus Stokes Jr, Secretary of Fantasy and Roleplay.
